summary.en: FOX commander responsible for objectives, intelligence and mission discipline.
summary.fr: Commandant de FOX responsable des objectifs, du renseignement et de la discipline.

biography.en: Major Zero directs both the Virtuous Mission and Operation Snake Eater from the radio support team.
biography.fr: Major Zero dirige la Mission Vertueuse et l'Operation Snake Eater depuis l'equipe radio.

relations.label: Former ally
relations.detail: Her defection transforms the mission and his orders.

loreNotes: Primary mission channel across the complete operation.

summary.en: Dedicated save channel for mission records and personal exchanges.
summary.fr: Canal de sauvegarde dedie aux donnees de mission et aux echanges personnels.

biography.en: Para-Medic records progress on a distinct frequency while sharing films, stories and observations.
biography.fr: Para-Medic enregistre la progression sur une frequence distincte et partage films et observations.

loreNotes: Separate channel from medical and survival support.

summary.en: Medical specialist and enthusiastic field encyclopedia.
summary.fr: Specialiste medicale et encyclopedie enthousiaste du terrain.

biography.en: She advises Snake about wounds, treatment, food, animals and plants encountered in the field.
biography.fr: Elle conseille Snake sur les blessures, les soins, la nourriture, les animaux et les plantes.

relations.label: Patient
relations.detail: Monitors Snake's health and survival choices.

loreNotes: The broadest repeat-call topic library in the MGS3 radio team.

summary.en: Snake's mentor before her defection changes the mission.
summary.fr: Mentor de Snake avant que sa defection ne transforme la mission.

biography.en: During the Virtuous Mission she teaches combat and survival. After the defection her channel becomes unavailable and narratively hostile.
biography.fr: Pendant la Mission Vertueuse elle enseigne combat et survie. Apres sa defection son canal devient indisponible et hostile.

relations.label: Student
relations.detail: A defining mentor relationship tested by the final mission.

loreNotes: Manual contact ends after the Virtuous Mission.

summary.en: Technical specialist analyzing weapons, equipment and hostile systems.
summary.fr: Specialiste technique analysant armes, equipements et systemes ennemis.

biography.en: SIGINT explains field hardware with a mix of engineering detail and experimental enthusiasm.
biography.fr: SIGINT explique le materiel avec un melange de detail technique et d'enthousiasme experimental.

relations.label: Technical support
relations.detail: Evaluates Snake's equipment and captured hardware.

loreNotes: Available after Operation Snake Eater begins.

summary.en: Field contact providing routes, disguises, transport and local intelligence.
summary.fr: Contact terrain fournissant routes, deguisements, transport et renseignement local.

biography.en: EVA supports Snake inside Soviet territory while concealing her own mission and allegiance.
biography.fr: EVA soutient Snake en territoire sovietique tout en dissimulant sa mission et son allegeance.

relations.label: Field partner
relations.detail: Operational and personal bond shaped by mutual deception.

loreNotes: Local channel content changes as her cover and mission evolve.
